filing.accompanying_filing_type.label: (Check one box only) to accompany the following:

entity.is_professional_corporation.label: (Check only if applicable) [ ] This is a professional corporation* formed pursuant to 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A to provide the following professional services:

entity.is_benefit_corporation.label: (Check only if applicable) [ ] This is a benefit corporation formed pursuant to 13-C MRSA §1803. This election has been adopted by at least the minimum status vote as defined in 13-C MRSA §1802.7.

entity.name.label: FIRST: The name of the corporation is

clerk.cra_public_number.label: SECOND: [ ] Commercial Clerk    CRA Public Number: ___

clerk.name.label: (name of commercial clerk) / (name of noncommercial clerk)

clerk.physical_address.label: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)

entity.share_structure.label: FOURTH: [ ] one class of shares / [ ] two or more classes or series

entity.authorized_shares_total.label: FOURTH: ...The number of authorized shares is ___

entity.multi_class_exhibit_letter.label: FOURTH (multi-class): ...is set forth in Exhibit ___ attached hereto

entity.has_board_of_directors.label: FIFTH: [ ] will have a board of directors / [ ] no directors (managed by shareholders)

entity.directors_count_limited.label: SIXTH: [ ] The number of directors is limited as follows: not fewer than ___ nor more than ___ directors. (13-C MRSA §803)

entity.director_liability_limited.label: SIXTH: [ ] To the fullest extent permitted by 13-C MRSA §202.2.D, a director shall have no liability to the Corporation or its shareholders for money damages for an action taken or a failure to take action as a director.

entity.mandatory_indemnification.label: SIXTH: [ ] Except as otherwise specified by contract or in its bylaws, the Corporation shall in all cases provide indemnification for its directors and officers to the fullest extent permitted by law (13-C MRSA §§202, 857, 859).

entity.preemptive_rights_elected.label: SEVENTH: (Check only if applicable) [ ] The Corporation elects to have preemptive rights as defined in 13-C MRSA §641.

entity.additional_provisions_present.label: EIGHTH: (Check only if applicable) [ ] Additional provisions of these Articles of Incorporation are set forth in Exhibit ___ attached hereto and made a part hereof. (13-C MRSA §202)

entity.additional_provisions_exhibit_let.label: EIGHTH: ...set forth in Exhibit ___ attached hereto
